code:
type Color =
  | Red
  | Green
  | Yellow

fn next(_ c: Color) -> Color
  match c
  when Red
    Color.Green
  when Green
    Color.Yellow
  when Yellow
    Color.Red
  end
end

fn name(_ c: Color) -> String
  match c
  when Red
    "Red"
  when Green
    "Green"
  when Yellow
    "Yellow"
  end
end

let s0 = Color.Red
println(name(s0))
let s1 = next(s0)
println(name(s1))
let s2 = next(s1)
println(name(s2))
let s3 = next(s2)
println(name(s3))
